questions.question: Recombinant hepatitis B vaccine is produced in:

options.B: Yeast (Saccharomyces cerevisiae – HBsAg expressed)

questions.question: A vector used in gene therapy for hereditary diseases must:

options.B: Deliver gene efficiently and safely, preferably integrate into genome without causing harm

questions.question: Bt crops have generated controversy because of concerns about:

options.B: Effects on non-target organisms, biodiversity, and gene flow to wild plants

questions.question: The Taq polymerase used in PCR is obtained from:

options.B: Thermus aquaticus (thermophilic bacterium from hot springs)

questions.question: Erythropoietin (EPO) produced by recombinant DNA technology is used to treat:

options.B: Anaemia in kidney failure patients

questions.question: The probe in Southern hybridization is:

options.B: Single-stranded labeled DNA/RNA complementary to target sequence

questions.question: Insulin produced by recombinant DNA technology differs from porcine insulin in that it:

options.B: Is identical to human insulin (no allergic reaction risk)

questions.question: The 'selectable marker' in a cloning vector allows:

options.B: Selection of transformed bacteria (antibiotic resistance gene kills non-transformed cells)

questions.question: STR (Short Tandem Repeat) analysis is more commonly used than VNTR in forensics because:

options.B: STRs can be analyzed from very small/degraded samples using PCR

questions.question: The first human gene therapy trial (1990) treated:

options.B: ADA-SCID (adenosine deaminase deficiency)

questions.question: Microarray (DNA chip) technology is used for:

options.B: Simultaneous expression analysis of thousands of genes

questions.question: The plasmid pBR322 carries resistance genes for:

options.B: Ampicillin and tetracycline

questions.question: RNA interference (RNAi) works by:

options.B: Silencing specific genes using dsRNA that degrades complementary mRNA

questions.question: The first transgenic animal produced was:

options.B: A mouse (1974, Rudolf Jaenisch)

questions.question: The 'Rosie' transgenic cow produced:

options.B: Human alpha-lactalbumin in milk (nutritionally enriched for human babies)

questions.question: Gene therapy using retrovirus as vector is used to treat:

options.B: SCID (Severe Combined Immunodeficiency) – ADA deficiency

questions.question: Golden Rice is a transgenic crop engineered to produce:

options.B: Beta-carotene (provitamin A) in endosperm

questions.question: Plasmids used as vectors in recombinant DNA technology must have:

options.B: Origin of replication, selectable marker (antibiotic resistance), and restriction sites

questions.question: In DNA fingerprinting, identical twins will have:

options.B: Identical DNA fingerprint profiles

questions.question: Sticky ends (cohesive ends) are produced by:

options.B: Restriction enzymes that make staggered cuts in palindromic DNA
